operator_directive: Take WD from 'Phase 13 proved runtime-integrated harvest in a bounded proof harness' to a real, measurable, live-runtime autonomy slice where one concrete production query entrypoint actually calls the autonomy harvest router during normal structured traffic.

p0_baseline_reconciliation.origin_main_subject: feat(autonomy): Phase 13 — runtime-integrated harvest and capability-aware autogrowth uptake
p0_baseline_reconciliation.baseline_truth_match: ALIGNED — operator-side narrative matches origin/main and tag state exactly

candidates_inspected.note: this IS the harvest router; we wire SolverRouter into it, not the other way
consumes SolverRouter; wiring inside SolverRouter naturally surfaces here
outer-loop only; not the inner-loop entrypoint

p04_entrypoint_inventory.chosen_seam_strategy: Backwards-compatible extension: when caller passes a low-risk-family hint via context['low_risk_autonomy_query'], SolverRouter checks the autonomy consult lane (RuntimeQueryRouter) BETWEEN the existing built-in capability selection and any LLM fallback. Existing callers without the hint see no behaviour change.
p04_entrypoint_inventory.test_seam: in-process call to SolverRouter.route(...) with the new context hint asserting that the autonomy consult activates and (after a harvest cycle) serves the auto-promoted solver

p2_chosen_entrypoint_truthful: waggledance.core.reasoning.solver_router.SolverRouter.route — production solver-first reasoning router. Existing 30+ unit tests in tests/autonomy/test_solver_router.py confirm production status.

p3_speed_design.in_memory_capability_index: WarmCapabilityIndex keyed on (family_kind, frozenset(features)) -> solver_id; populated lazily from solver_capability_features; invalidated on promotion / deactivation via SchedulerStats / explicit invalidate hook
p3_speed_design.parsed_artifact_cache: ArtifactCache keyed on solver_id -> parsed_artifact dict; TTL infinite within process; invalidated on artifact_id change
p3_speed_design.buffered_signal_sink: BufferedSignalSink with bounded queue (max_unflushed_signals=1000) + bounded age (max_unflushed_age_ms=500); explicit flush() and atexit hook; documented hard-kill loss bound = max(unflushed_signals_at_kill, signals_within_age_window)
